title: abeec XL Christmas Bags with Tags – Pack of 4 Extra Large Traditional Christmas Designs – 33 × 46 × 12 cm – Reusable Paper Bags
features: Classic festive prints – Includes red car, sleigh, red barn, and Christmas tree wagon designs for a timeless look.
Spacious size – Each bag measures 33 × 46 × 12 cm, perfect for bulky presents.
Gift tag included – Matching 6 × 6 cm tags allow for personal messages.
Reusable construction – Sturdy laminated paper with reinforced handles, built to last.
Perfect under the tree – Ideal for creating a traditional Christmas look while wrapping large presents.
description: Product Description Gift Bags and accesories by abeec Christmas Gift Bags x 4 Add To Basket Christmas Gift Bags x 4 Add To Basket Christmas Bags Bulk x 16 Add To Basket Christmas Gift Bags x 12 Add To Basket Christmas Wrapping Paper Add To Basket Christmas 120 Gift Labels Add To Basket 6 Wine Gift Bags Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.9 out of 5 stars 12 4.9 out of 5 stars 12 4.9 out of 5 stars 12 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,099 4.5 out of 5 stars 40 4.6 out of 5 stars 117 4.5 out of 5 stars 64 Price £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £11.69 £ 11 . 69 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 Pack Size 4 gift bags 4 gift bags 16 gift bags 12 gift bags (mixed size) 20 Sheets 120 Labels 6 Bottle Bags Dimensions of Item 33 × 46 × 12 cm 33 × 46 × 12 cm 33 × 46 × 12 cm Mixed Sizes 70 x 50cm Sheets Mixed Sizes 36 × 12 × 8 cm Design Style 4 styles available 4 styles available All 4 sets included Mixed Festive Designs Mixed Festive Prints Mixed Festive Designs Festive bottle prints Best For Large Family Gifts Large Family Gifts Large Family Gifts Small & Medium Gifts Secret Santa, smaller gifts Labelling Gifts Wine bottles Includes Tags ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✘ ✘ ✔ Reuasable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Extra Large Festive Gift Bags for Joyful Christmas Wrapping The abeec XL festive animal gift bags bring fun to your Christmas wrapping. The pack of 4 gift bags includes a range of Christmas designs, all extra large (33 × 46 × 12 cm). Each comes with a gift tag and sturdy handles. Eco-friendly and reusable, these bags are ideal for oversized gifts, office exchanges, or festive family surprises. Also available as a 16 pack of Christmas Gift Bags. The abeec 16-pack XL gift bag bundle offers the ultimate Christmas wrapping solution. With 4 design sets (characters, animals, novelty, and traditional), you’ll have a bag ready for any gift. Each bag is extra large (33 × 46 × 12 cm), with matching tags and sturdy handles. Perfect for family gifting, festive events, or businesses wrapping multiple presents. Durable, reusable, and excellent value for Christmas 2025. Suitable for: - Christmas Gift Bags Gift Bags for Presents Large Christmas Gift Bags Christmas Gift Bags Multipack Are these bags strong enough for heavy presents? Yes, they are made with laminated paper and reinforced handles. Do the bags come with tags? Yes, each bag includes a matching 6 × 6 cm gift tag. Can the bags be reused? Absolutely – they’re designed for multiple Christmases. Are all bags the same design? Each set includes 4 different festive designs. Also available as a multipack of 16 bags (4 x 4 of each design) What size gifts will fit? The bags measure 33 × 46 × 12 cm, perfect for toys, clothes, or hampers.
